wfPathways.name: Qualified existing staff
wfPathways.min: Recognised relevant QQI Level 5 major award or equivalent / higher
wfPathways.core: Care Skills + Care of Older Person included in the award
wfPathways.evidence: Verified qualification, manual handling, safeguarding, Children First, IPC, annual NCCA, training plan
wfPathways.dementia: Allowed once dementia education is complete

wfPathways.name: New entrant — relevant experience
wfPathways.min: Commit to complete QQI Level 5 in Healthcare Support within 2 years
wfPathways.core: Both core modules within first 11 months
wfPathways.evidence: Induction, shadowing, mandatory training, annual NCCA, training plan
wfPathways.dementia: Not for dementia assignment until recognised programme complete

wfPathways.name: New entrant — no experience
wfPathways.min: Currently undertaking relevant QQI Level 5 in Healthcare Support
wfPathways.core: Both core modules within first 11 months
wfPathways.evidence: Induction, shadowing, mandatory training, annual NCCA, training plan
wfPathways.dementia: Not for dementia assignment until recognised programme complete

wfPathways.name: Unqualified existing staff
wfPathways.min: Paid home-care experience > 3 years in last 5 years
wfPathways.core: Core modules minimum within 11 months; full award encouraged
wfPathways.evidence: Qualification pathway plus mandatory statutory training

wfPathways.name: Equivalent / alternative qualification
wfPathways.example: Nursing Year 1 or allied therapy degree
wfPathways.min: Equivalent qualification or another jurisdiction / accepted alternative route
wfPathways.core: If core modules not covered, complete them
wfPathways.evidence: Qualification verification plus any missing statutory training
wfPathways.dementia: Allowed only when dementia programme complete
